label: Notification mailhost:port
description: SMTP host:port for sending Workflow/Step Notifications

label: Mailhost User
description: SMTP authentication username for notification emails

label: Mailhost Password
description: SMTP authentication password for notification emails

label: Default Timeout (seconds)
description: Default timeout for individual Step Executions

label: Retain Logs (days)
description: How long to keep Workflow/Step Runtime Logs
